name: Skill Creator
description: Meta-skill for designing, building, evaluating, and iteratively improving Claude agent skills. Provides an agentic loop with specialized sub-agents (analyzer, comparator, grader), benchmark and evaluation scripts, and a visual review dashboard. Guides Claude through the full skill development lifecycle from initial design to quality validation.

findings_summary.notes: Official Anthropic skill from anthropics/skills repository. Contains SKILL.md, sub-agent prompts, Python evaluation/benchmarking scripts, and an HTML eval review viewer. Apache-2.0 LICENSE.txt present. Verified at skills/skill-creator/ in the repo tree.
